content.en:
After the Frostless Lord left, Ye Tian went to the Inheritance Treasure House of the True Saintless Land to apply for the secret art of exchanging the Eternal Heart.

As a member of the Heavenly Rank Saint Son, Ye Tian was naturally qualified to exchange for the Eternal Heart Secret Technique, and he only needed to pay very few resources.

Subsequently, Ye Tian inherited this secret technique in the inheritance treasure house, but he could not teach it to others, which was a inheritance limitation.

Before the inheritance, Ye Tian didn't know what the so-called Eternal Heart was, but after the inheritance, he knew

The Eternal Heart is a special crystal condensed and compressed by the Eternal Force, similar to a heart, which can increase its own strength.

What's more, the Heart of Eternity is able to increase the Eternal Force.

After the three aspects of the body, will, and innate eternal rules are fused to reach ten percent, they can impact the consummation realm, and at this time, the body is equivalent to having ten percent eternal force.

At this point, it is almost difficult to increase the Eternal Force, because the whole body is full of the Eternal Force, how can it be increased?

The Eternal Heart, on the other hand, can compress and condense the excess Eternal Force into a single heart, which ensures that the Eternal Force inside the body becomes more abundant.

In addition, the Legendary Lord of the Initial Realm can also cultivate the Eternal Heart, although it is difficult to practice, but once it is cultivated, it can use the Eternal Power contained in the Eternal Heart to temper the whole body, impact the last trace of shackles, and reach the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm.

This was also the reason why Lord Frostless suggested that Ye Tian cultivate the secret art of the Eternal Heart.

The Heart of Eternity is a secret technique created by the Legendary Realm Lord over a long period of time, and it is very important for the True Void Holy Land, cultivating a large number of Perfection Realm Legendary Lords for the True Void Holy Land.

After Ye Tian obtained the Eternal Heart, he tried to cultivate.

"Hey, it doesn't seem that difficult!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He guessed if his talent was too awesome, so it was easier to cultivate the Eternal Heart, because the Eternal Heart was about its own understanding of the body, will, and innate eternal rules, and these three aspects were also related to talent.

His talent far surpassed that of any Legendary Lord, and even the Talent of the Legendary Realm Lord was inferior to his.

With such a talent, he naturally had a huge advantage in cultivating the Eternal Heart.

And so the years passed, and before I knew it, ten eternal years had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Heart is about to be cultivated

Body.

Rumble!!!!

Countless Eternal Force forces condensed in the sea of will sources, gradually constructing the appearance of a heart.

For a long time, this heart was completely condensed, exuding a powerful aura.

"Practiced'

Ye Tian was able to sense the tempering of his body and the increase in strength of the Eternal Heart at this moment.

He can use the Eternal Heart to extract the Eternal Force in his body, and then continue to fuse his body, will, and innate eternal rules to form a new Eternal Force again.

In this way, there will be more and more Eternal Force in his body, and it will even help the fusion of his body, will, and innate eternal rules, accelerating his cultivation.

With the cooperation of the Eternal Heart, he can reach the peak realm of the Legendary Lord of the Initial Realm faster.

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to hit the peak realm of the Origin Realm Legendary Lord.

After a long time, some new faces appeared in the Source Sea, all of them were lords above the Immortal Realm, and there were even some legendary lords.

Ye Tian didn't stop them, and let them haunt the source sea.

At this time, the source sea did not have many resources, and these strong people would not be greedy for such a thing, so gradually, there were not many strong people in the source sea, but there were still some eternal realm lords who stayed in the source sea and the space-time territory.

At the very least, there is less strife here, and there is hope that more resources will be obtained in the future, and if you are lucky, you will get an eternal treasure and you will make a lot of money.

For these Eternal Realm Lords who came from the Immeasurable Sea or other Eternal Seas, as long as they did not endanger the sovereignty of the Terrans, the Guardian Legion, or the Source Sea, he almost didn't care.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of eternal years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation was raised to the pinnacle realm of the Origin Realm Legendary Lord.

At this time, he was only close to being able to completely and perfectly integrate ten percent of his body with his will and innate eternal rules, and stepped into the realm of the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm.

But this point is very difficult to cross, and many Origin Realm Legendary Lords have never broken this shackle in their lives.

Ye Tian tried to break this shackle with the help of the Eternal Heart, but found that it was still a little worse.

"It seems that we must go to the treasure land of the ruins of the true unholy land!"

The Returning Ruins Treasure Land is a very important treasure land of the True No Holy Land, and not all members of the Holy Land can enter it, but Ye Tian can enter the Returning Ruins Treasure Land for free.

Strictly speaking, the Returning Ruins Treasure Land is not within the True Immortal Treasure Land, but the True Immortal Land has a space-time passage to the Returning Ruins Treasure Land.

There is really no holy place, return to the ruin gate.

Ye Tian came here and immediately walked into the ruin gate.

The space-time passage behind the Ruins Gate is somewhat similar to the Space-Time Ladder, but it is somewhat different from the Space-Time Ladder, which is a flat space-time passage and does not lead to other Eternal Seas.

But this space-time passage is very secretive, and even the lord of the Legendary Realm is difficult to spy on this space-time passage in the outside world.

Soon, Ye Tian passed through the space-time passage behind the Returning Ruins Gate and arrived at the real Returning Ruins Treasure Land.

......

The whole ruin is not very large, the center is a spring, there are energy channels around it, and hundreds of millions of roads are connected to the springs.

If you look down from a high place, you will find that hundreds of millions of roads have converged from nothingness and poured into this spring, or that hundreds of millions of roads are united and come together in one place, and after these roads enter the spring, they all turn into the same kind of source energy.

This kind of origin energy gathers the power of hundreds of millions of paths, but it does not contain the power of any one path, as if it is nothingness, and it seems to be the source of all power.

"'That's how it is!'"

Ye Tian muttered.

He saw that there were Legendary Lords (good and good) sitting on those roads, and even saw a familiar figure, the Silver Moon Lord, who had also come here, and seemed to be also impacting the Legendary Lord Realm of the Perfection Realm.

Each of these billions of paths is one, and the Legendary Eternal Realm can find a path that suits itself, where it can be enlightened and comprehend the mystery of energy unity.

The body is energy, the will is also energy, and the innate eternal rules can also be regarded as energy.

There are hundreds of millions of types of energy, but here it is the unity of hundreds of millions of energies, if you can comprehend a little mystery, it will help to break through.

This is also the reason why many legendary lords at the peak of the Initial Realm come here to participate in enlightenment and cultivation.

Ye Tian found a hybrid path that suited him a little, sat on it, and began to carefully comprehend the mystery of energy unity, and at the same time cooperate with the eternal heart to find an opportunity to break through.

If you break through all at once, it is unlikely that you will be noon

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to spend some more years here, and strive to break through to the Legendary Lord Realm of the Consummation Realm as soon as possible. _
